name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.4 Responsive layout and focus hierarchy correction
label: Responsive layout and focus hierarchy correction
release_notes: Corrects mobile overflow, restores responsive desktop width, and reworks focus/support hierarchy in Projects and printable Tasklist.
notes: Restored responsive layout rules so hosted pages use desktop width on desktop while preventing horizontal panning on phones.
Corrected focus-based project hierarchy so supporting time blocks render directly inside their parent focus block without exposing raw HTML.
Updated Tasklist ordering so supporting time blocks remain directly beneath the focus block/progress item they support, even when scheduled earlier.
Improved printable tasklist hierarchy with proper indentation and subtle support-row styling rather than prefix characters.
Clarified that public Privacy, Terms and Google access pages are OAuth review links, while About & Privacy remains the in-app explanation page.
release_name: Responsive layout and focus hierarchy correction
